title: verbascum × thermiense
intro: Verbascum × thermiense, also known as the Giant Mullein, is a sterile hybrid plant that belongs to the Verbascum genus, characterized by its large, velvety leaves and tall spikes of yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Verbascum × thermiense include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
